label: OUR PRODUCTS
heading: Kitchen Cabinets
intro: Factory-direct kitchen cabinetry in three distinct series — each offering a unique aesthetic with consistent quality, KCMA certification, and 2-week local delivery from our Aurora warehouse.

series.name: Classic Series
series.desc: Timeless shaker-style doors with a clean, versatile profile. Available in a curated palette of matte and gloss finishes.

series.name: Delight Series
series.desc: Contemporary flat-panel doors with a sleek, modern aesthetic. Perfect for minimalist and transitional kitchen designs.

series.name: Grand Series
series.door_count: 19 door colours available · More AGT colours on request
series.desc: More choices from AGT colours are available now. Scant 3/4 inch thick MDF board, with PET laminate on the exterior and melamine laminate on the interior, ABS banding of matching colour on all edges.
